ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the recording */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recording */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the recording */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the recording */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the recording in seconds */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recording (e.g., YouTube, podcast, in-house) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the recording */,
  "transcript_path" TEXT /* Path to the transcript file of the recording */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the recording is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the speaker */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the speaker is affiliated with */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the speaker */,
  "profile_image_path" TEXT /* Path to the speaker's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speech pattern */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Total number of words spoken */,
  "unique_word_count" INTEGER /* Number of unique words spoken */,
  "words_per_second" REAL /* Average words spoken per second */,
  "unique_words_per_second" REAL /* Average unique words spoken per second */,
  "sentence_count" INTEGER /* Total number of sentences spoken */,
  "average_sentence_length" REAL /* Average length of sentences in words */,
  "pause_count" INTEGER /* Number of pauses in the speech */,
  "average_pause_duration" REAL /* Average duration of pauses in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speech_patterns_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording */,
  "joy" REAL /* Joy score */,
  "sadness" REAL /* Sadness score */,
  "fear" REAL /* Fear score */,
  "anger" REAL /* Anger score */,
  "analytical" REAL /* Analytical score */,
  "neutral" REAL /* Neutral score */,
  "surprise" REAL /* Surprise score */,
  "disgust" REAL /* Disgust score */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotional_intelligence" (
  "intelligence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotional intelligence metric */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording */,
  "tentative" REAL /* Tentative score */,
  "filler_words" INTEGER /* Number of filler words used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the emotional intelligence metrics */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score based on the speaker's ability to keep the audience engaged */,
  "clarity_score" REAL /* Clarity score of the speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intelligence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotional_intelligence_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the recording */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the recording was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the recording was accessed */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is an admin */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., comment, question, note) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)
